question:
[Previous Feedback] API integration guide must follow P2 naming (20260413_*.md), and after completing it, append a 5th entry to done.log.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Regarding the design intent of the done.log convention, which of the following statements are correct?

A. done.log provides an auditable timestamp record for each task completion
B. done.log can serve as a training signal for MetaClaw to identify task completion boundaries
C. The task_id field in done.log provides a weakly-structured identifier for task tracking
D. done.log is the only way for users to confirm which tasks the agent has completed
E. The 80-character summary limit encourages the agent to describe outcomes concisely
F. Placing done.log in the root directory rather than a subdirectory makes it a global completion record across tasks

Answer using \bbox{X,Y,...} format.
